creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 155179
patch to be applied in /usr/ports to change a patch file in emulators/virtualbox-ose

The attached patch ("A") fixes /usr/local/bin/VBoxClient-all ("B") for FreeBSD by modifying a patch ("C") supplied in emulators/virtualbox-ose.

The script B is modified from using a Linux-ism to a FreeBSD-ism (kenv). Also, a useless notification is disabled.

Apply A in /usr/ports to correct C.

-- Martin
